mapper.sql: id, username, password, open_id, role, status, password_reset_required, display_nickname, mini_bind_type, mini_preferences_json, auth_profile
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE open_id = #{openId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(id, username, password, open_id, role, status, password_reset_required, display_nickname, mini_bind_type, mini_preferences_json, auth_profile) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{openId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{passwordResetRequired}, #{displayNickname}, #{miniBindType}, #{miniPreferencesJson}, #{authProfile})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET display_nickname = #{displayNickname}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET mini_preferences_json = #{miniPreferencesJson}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET auth_profile = #{authProfile}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET open_id = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET role = #{role}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, password_reset_required = #{passwordResetRequired}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_bind_audit(open_id, identifier, bind_type, client_ip, status, message) VALUES (#{openId}, #{identifier}, #{bindType}, #{clientIp}, #{status}, #{message})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1 AND ( CASE role WHEN 'STUDENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'STAFF' THEN 2 WHEN 'SENIOR' THEN 3 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 4 WHEN 'SUPER_ADMIN' THEN 5 WHEN 'PLATFORM_OWNER' THEN 6 ELSE 0 END ) >= #{minRoleLevel}
